visual_identity.base_silhouette: small original lazy egg-yolk body, soft oval blob shape, slightly melted underside, simple thin arms and legs
visual_identity.eyes: two tiny sleepy dot eyes with a flat deadpan mouth
visual_identity.line_style: slightly wobbly black hand-drawn outline with a pale yellow fill
visual_identity.default_pose_language: sleepy, reluctant, deadpan operator energy; tired but still doing the core work

core_role.description: An original lazy egg-yolk operator that participates in the main visual mechanism despite looking exhausted.
core_role.forbidden_role: decorative mascot, branded character imitation, corner decoration, idle observer, or poster-like cute pose

action_library.description: Carry raw material while sagging slightly from effort.
action_library.prompt_snippet: The lazy yolk operator slumps forward while carrying raw material into the main mechanism.

action_library.description: Pull a lever or rope with reluctant effort.
action_library.prompt_snippet: The lazy yolk operator reluctantly pulls a lever connected to the core mechanism.

action_library.description: Sort blocks or tokens with a tired deadpan expression.
action_library.prompt_snippet: The lazy yolk operator sleepily sorts small tokens into simple physical piles.

action_library.description: Point at the key comparison while half-slumped over the workbench.
action_library.prompt_snippet: The lazy yolk operator points at the key comparison while half-slumped over the workbench.

action_library.description: Repair a tiny machine while drooping over the tool.
action_library.prompt_snippet: The lazy yolk operator droops over a tiny tool while repairing the low-tech machine.

deformation_rules.description: The yolk body gently sags into a funnel-like shape while remaining an original egg-yolk worker.
deformation_rules.prompt_snippet: Conditionally let the lazy yolk body sag into a simple funnel-like shape while keeping the sleepy dot eyes and small limbs recognizable.

deformation_rules.description: The yolk worker is lightly wedged in a low-tech bottleneck.
deformation_rules.prompt_snippet: Show the lazy yolk operator lightly wedged in the bottleneck mechanism, still recognizable and not grotesque.

deformation_rules.description: The yolk worker is mildly flattened by pressure.
deformation_rules.prompt_snippet: Show the lazy yolk operator mildly flattened by pressure while preserving the sleepy face and soft oval silhouette.
